calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Kai Shi Chen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Xiao Ji Chen and Jin Ji Chen, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Co-Petitioner/Minors' Mother: Suhua Lin, but signed the Petition consenting to the Name Change of the Two Minors.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Max Siaoji Chen and Kenny Jinji Chen.
Decree signed in open court.
